partial_progress.details: Extensive analysis of completeness proof strategies. File cleaned up, helper lemma added, LinearExtension import added. 1 sorry remains in main completeness theorem. The sorry encapsulates the Z-chain construction + truth lemma, which requires ~500 lines of additional technical MCS reasoning.

review_reason: The temporal completeness theorem requires a Z-chain construction with a full truth lemma including Until/Since cases. This is estimated at ~500 additional lines of highly technical proof. The canonical model approach (LinearExtension) was analyzed and found to have fundamental issues with the truth lemma. See handoff for detailed analysis of three viable approaches.
